rows.notes: Top-of-page title is clearly written across the header; no monetary columns attached. Handwriting and punctuation are legible.

Numeric columns aligned with vertical rulings; pounds '2563', shillings '15', pence '9' clearly formed and within valid ranges.
Amount columns clear: '6' pounds and '13' shillings. Description has trailing dots and is slightly abbreviated in the ledger; the wording is legible but minimal.
Description and numeric columns are clearly written. Pounds '109', shillings '5' unambiguous; pence column blank (interpreted as 0).
Amount '2 15 0' is clear in the columns. The description has some cramped letters (e.g. 'held' could be read variously), so text reading is moderately uncertain though meaning is inferable.
Columns align well; '482' pounds, '8' shillings, '4' pence readable. Minor ink variation in the desciptive word 'Recharges' but amount is unambiguous.
Description and numeric columns clear. Pence column empty (interpreted as 0). Vertical alignment consistent with surrounding lines.

Amount columns read '527 4 8' clearly. Description is legible. Vertical column rulings confirm column boundaries.
